start.line: Gate's bolted. I slide it for a quince — one quince, that's the toll.

options.text: Where do I find a quince?
Who puts a toll on a garden gate?
I'll see what I can do.

where.line: Tree's right there. The reachable fruit went to the wasps — you'll want the pruning hook I lost in the hedge somewhere.

toll.line: A gardener does. It's a good gate and a better quince — you'll come out ahead.

options.text: Fair enough. Where do I find one?
